                                              463

                                              When was the Criminal Investigation Department (CID) formed in Pakistan?

                                              Correct Answer: 1995
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The Criminal Investigation Department (CID) in Pakistan was formally established in 1995.

                                              It operates under the CID Manual, 1937.

                                              It has grown into a department with regional offices across Punjab.

                                              464

                                              The star in the Pakistani flag represents ____?

                                              Correct Answer: Light and knowledge
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The National Flag of Pakistan was designed by: Amir Uddin Kidwai

                                              The crescent in the Pakistani Flag represents progress

                                              The national flag of Pakistan was adopted on 11 August 1947.

                                              Pakistan flag's green and white color explains the Muslim majority in Pakistan and various religious minorities.

                                              The Dark green field in the flag of Pakistan represents Muslim Majority

                                              The star in the Pakistani flag represents light and knowledge

                                              The white strip in the flag of Pakistan represents Minority

                                              پاکستان کے جھنڈے ميں ہر ا (گرين) رنگ خوشحالی کا ظاہر کرتا ہے 

                                              ND2-03-2023

                                              465

                                              Who was elected as a temporary Chairman on the first day of the inaugural session of the first Constituent Assembly from 10-14 August 1947?

                                              Correct Answer: J.N. Mandal
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Jogendra Nath Mandal was elected as the temporary Chairman on the first day of the inaugural session of the first Constituent Assembly from 10-14 August 1947.

                                              He presided over the initial proceedings in Karachi.

                                              466

                                              Through which Amendment in the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan (1973), the military courts were established for speedy trial for terrorist offenses, waging war against Pakistan and acts threatening the security of Pakistan?

                                              Correct Answer: 21st Amendment
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The 21st Amendment to the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan (1973) established military courts for the speedy trial of terrorist offenses, waging war against Pakistan, and acts threatening national security.

                                              This amendment aimed to address increasing security concerns and ensure swift justice.

                                              467

                                              Through which Amendment in the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan (1973), floor crossing was forbade and considered as a breach of Parliamentary rules?

                                              Correct Answer: 14th Amendment
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The 14th Amendment to the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan (1973) forbade floor crossing and considered it a breach of parliamentary rules.

                                              This amendment aimed to strengthen party discipline and stability.

                                              468

                                              The Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan (1973) in its amended form is the ______ longest constitution in the world.

                                              Correct Answer: 7th
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan (1973), in its amended form, is the 7th longest constitution in the world, with a word count of 56,240.

                                              Its length is due to numerous amendments and detailed provisions.

                                              469

                                              The draft of the First Constitution of Pakistan was introduced in the Assembly on ______ and passed by the Assembly on ______, and assent was given by the Governor General on _______?

                                              Correct Answer: 9th January 1956, 29th February 1956, 2nd March, 1956
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The draft of this Constitution was introduced in the Assembly on 9th January 1956 and was passed by the Assembly on 29th February 1956.

                                              The assent was given on it by the Governor General on 2nd March 1956.

                                              This Constitution was enforced with effect from 23rd March 1956.

                                              470

                                              Who was the first to produce literary essays in Sindhi?

                                              Correct Answer: Kauromal Chandanmal Khilnani
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Kauromal Chandanmal Khilnani was the first to produce literary essays in Sindhi.

                                               Kauromal's well known works are Ratnavali (1888), Aryanari-carita (1905) and Radharani (1914).

                                              471

                                              In, ______ Pakistan and USA signed a Defense Pact in which later guaranteed the security of Pakistan in the event of Communist attack.

                                              Correct Answer: 1954
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              In 1954, Pakistan and the USA signed a Defense Pact under which the US agreed to assist Pakistan if it was attacked by Communist forces.

                                              This agreement was part of a broader strategy to contain Communist expansion during the Cold War.

                                              472

                                              Who conquered Constantinople?

                                              Correct Answer: Sultan Mehmed II of the Ottoman Empire
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Sultan Mehmed II conquered Constantinople on May 29, 1453.

                                              473

                                              Which poet of Sindh was called Poet of Haft Zaban?

                                              Correct Answer: Sachal Sarmast
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The poet of Sindh known as the "Poet of Haft Zaban" is "Sachal Sarmast."

                                              He earned this title for his proficiency in writing poetry in seven languages.

                                              474

                                              Which Pakistani Prime Minister successfully broke the constitutional deadlock and resolved the issue of representation between East and West in the Federal legislature in 1950s?

                                              Correct Answer: Muhammad Ali Bogra
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Prime Minister Muhammad Ali Bogra resolved the East-West representation issue in the 1950s with the "Bogra Formula," ending a six-year constitutional deadlock.

                                              This breakthrough, achieved by the end of 1953, helped advance the stalled constitution-making process.

                                              475

                                              Pakistan attended its first summit conference of Non Aligned Movement (NAM) as full fledged member, which was held at _____ on _____?

                                              Correct Answer: Havana, 3rd September 1979
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Pakistan attended its first summit conference of the Non-Aligned Movement (NAM) as a full-fledged member in Havana on September 3, 1979.

                                              This summit marked Pakistan's formal participation in NAM's activities after joining the movement as a member state.

                                              476

                                              Who represented Pakistan on Punjab Boundary Commission?

                                              Correct Answer: Din Muhammad and Muhammad Munir
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Nawab Abdur Rab Nishtar and Choudhry Rehmat Ali represented Pakistan on the Punjab Boundary Commission.

                                              They played a crucial role in the partition process, helping to determine the boundaries of the newly created Pakistan.

                                              477

                                              As per the Article 228 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan (1973), the Council of Islamic Ideology shall consists of ______ members.

                                              Correct Answer: 8 to 20
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              According to Article 228 of the Constitution of Pakistan (1973), the Council of Islamic Ideology shall consist of 8 to 20 members.

                                              These members are appointed to advise on the alignment of laws with Islamic principles.

                                              478

                                              The total strength of the Cabinet including the Ministers of State, shall not exceed ______ % of the total membership of Majlis-e-Shoora (Parliament).

                                              Correct Answer: 11
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The total strength of the Cabinet, including the Ministers of State, shall not exceed 11% of the total membership of the Majlis-e-Shura (Parliament).

                                              This provision ensures a manageable size of the executive branch relative to the legislature.

                                              Article 92(1) of the Constitution of Pakistan specifies this limit.

                                              479

                                              The National Assembly shall meet on the ____ day following the day on which a general election to the Assembly is held, unless sooner summoned by the President.

                                              Correct Answer: Twenty First
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The National Assembly shall meet on the Twenty-First day following the day on which a general election to the Assembly is held, unless sooner summoned by the President.

                                              This rule ensures the Assembly convenes promptly to begin its legislative work.

                                              This is according to Article 224 of the Constitution of Pakistan.

                                              480

                                              The 20 year Perspective Plan was prepared by Pakistan in?

                                              Correct Answer: 1965
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation
                                              • The 20-year Perspective Plan was prepared by Pakistan for the period 1965-85.
                                              • The plan aimed to increase domestic coal production from 4.5 to 60 million tonnes per year and to eliminate dependence on foreign assistance.
                                              481

                                              Radcliffe Commission was headed by _____?

                                              Correct Answer: Sir Cyril Radcliffe
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The Radcliffe Commission was headed by Sir Cyril Radcliffe. 

                                              This commission was responsible for demarcating the borders between India and Pakistan in 1947.

                                              482

                                              Muslim General who conquer Sindh was ______?

                                              Correct Answer: Nephew of hajjaj bin Yusuf
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The Arab conquest of Sindh by the Nephew of Hajjaj bin Yusuf (Muhammad bin Qasim) in 712 AD gave the Muslims a firm foothold on the sub-continent.


                                              483

                                              On which date did General Qasem Soleimani assassinated?

                                              Correct Answer: January 3, 2020
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              General Qasim Suleimani

                                              Head

                                              Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps

                                              Started career

                                              1980

                                              Killed

                                              3 January 2020

                                              Laid Down

                                              8 January 2022

                                              Laid down in

                                              Kerman, Iran

                                              484

                                              Who was the last Caretaker Finance Minister of Pakistan in 2024?

                                              Correct Answer: Jalil Abbas Jilani
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Jalil Abbas Jilani served in Grade 22 as the Foreign Secretary of Pakistan.

                                              He is former Caretaker Minister of Foreign Affairs,

                                              He served in office from 17 August 2023 till 04 March 2024.

                                              He was born on February 3, 1955, in Multan

                                              485

                                              Anwar ul haq was served as?

                                              Correct Answer: Care taker PM
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Anwar ul Haq served as the longest-serving 8th caretaker Prime Minister

                                              From 14 August 2023 and 4 March 202

                                              Preceded by: Shehbaz Sharif

                                              Succeeded by: Shehbaz Sharif

                                              Political party: Independent (2024-present)

                                              486

                                              Which government institution is primarily responsible for making laws?

                                              Correct Answer: Legislative Branch
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The Legislative Branch of government is responsible for making laws

                                              487

                                              Justice Qazi Faez Isa is the Chief Justice of which court?

                                              Correct Answer: Supreme Court of Pakistan
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation
                                              Justice Qazi Faez Isa took oath as a judge of the Supreme Court of Pakistan on 5 September 2014
                                              About Justice Qazi Faez Isa 29th CJP of Pakistan
                                              Sworn in as CJP: 17th September 2023
                                              Predecessor:  Umar Ata Bandial
                                              Retirement: 25 October 2024
                                              488

                                              Which of the following is Cottage Industry?

                                              Correct Answer: Handicraft
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                               The cottage industry means the industry which manufactures things in the home 

                                              A cottage industry is a small-scale,

                                              ND 30-03-2923


                                              489

                                              How many seats were captured by Congress in the 1937 Elections?

                                              Correct Answer: 716
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              In the 1937 elections, the Indian National Congress captured 716 seats.

                                              The elections were held for the provincial assemblies of British India.

                                              • Congress: 716 seats
                                              • Muslim League: 108 seats
                                              • Unionist Party: 103 seats
                                              490

                                              During which era did the industrial and agricultural revolution take place in Pakistan?

                                              Correct Answer: Ayub Khan
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              During the era of Ayub Khan (1958-1969), Pakistan experienced significant industrial and agricultural revolutions.

                                              These reforms led to major developments in infrastructure, agriculture, and industry.

                                              491

                                              Which is the most populated city of Sindh?

                                              Correct Answer: Karachi
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Sindh is a province of Pakistan.

                                              Sindh is the third-largest province of Pakistan by land area

                                              Sindh is the second-largest province by population after Punjab

                                              Sindh is known as Bab-ul-Islam (the gateway of Islam),


                                              Sindh has 30 Districts and 7 district

                                              The mountain range located in Sindh is Kirthar Range

                                              There are three Barrages in Sindh

                                              The mountain range located in Sindh is Kirthar Range

                                              Sindhi is written in a version of the Arabic script.

                                              Sindhi is the official language of the Pakistani province of Sindh.

                                              The Sindhi language is the oldest language

                                              Karachi is the biggest Division of Sindh by population and Hyderabad is the largest Division of Sindh by area.

                                              What is the total estimated forest area of Sindh ?

                                              0.92 million hectares

                                              ND13-5-2023

                                              492

                                              In mountainous areas of Pakistan, People make their living through agriculture and ____?

                                              Correct Answer: Tourism
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              In the mountainous areas of Pakistan, alongside agriculture, tourism is a significant source of income.

                                              Due to the region's natural beauty and attraction for visitors.

                                              493

                                              Pakistan received only ____ industrial units out of 921 units in united India.

                                              Correct Answer: 34
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Pakistan received only 34 out of 921 industrial units in united India.

                                              It included cotton textile, cigarettes, sugar, rice husking, cotton ginning, and flour milling industries.

                                              These industries contributed only 7% of GDP.

                                              It employed just over 26,000 people.

                                              494

                                              The conflict over water was especially related to which of the following?

                                              Correct Answer: Bari-Doab Canal
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The conflict over water was especially related to the Bari-Doab Canal.

                                              The Bari-Doab Canal, part of the Indus River system.

                                              It has historically been a contentious point between regions.

                                              Due to its crucial role in irrigation and water distribution.

                                              495

                                              In 1927 Jinnah called a Conference of All Muslim leaders. The conference resulted in several demands known as?

                                              Correct Answer: Delhi Proposals
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation
                                              • The 1927 meeting refers to the Delhi Muslim Proposals
                                              • Held in Delhi on 20th March 1927
                                              Muhammad Ali Jinnah proposed terms to the Indian National Congress to Demands 
                                              • secure Muslim political rights
                                              • the separation of Sindh,
                                              • reforms in NWFP and Balochistan
                                              • 1/3 representation in the Central Legislature.



                                              496

                                              In 1930, Allama Iqbal Two-Nations theory in ___?

                                              Correct Answer: Allahabad
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation
                                              • The Allahabad Address was a notable speech by Sir Muhammad Iqbal.
                                                • He delivered during the 25th annual session of the All-India Muslim League on 29 December 1930, in Allahabad, British India.
                                                • Dr. Sir Muhammad Iqbal presided over this session.
                                                497

                                                After gap of 40 years Pakistan won gold medal in Olympics 2024 in which sport field?

                                                Correct Answer: Javelin Throw
                                                Show explanation
                                                Explanation

                                                Arshad Nadeem set a new Olympic record by clinching the coveted gold medal in the men’s javelin final

                                                This ended Pakistan’s 32-year wait for success at the Games 

                                                Throw: 92.97-m throw

                                                Winning date: 8 Aug 2024

                                                Arshad belongs to Mian Channu.

                                                 Nadeem’s throw was Pakistan’s first individual gold medal

                                                Note: It also shattered the previous Olympic record of 90.57m, set by the Netherlands’ Andreas Thorkildsen at the Beijing 2008 Olympics.

                                                The throw now stands as the sixth longest throw ever, and the best in the world this year.

                                                 ****

                                                498

                                                Which Pakistani athlete has won gold medal in Paris Olympic Games 2024?

                                                Correct Answer: Arshad Nadeem
                                                Show explanation
                                                Explanation

                                                Arshad Nadeem set a new Olympic record by clinching the coveted gold medal in the men’s javelin final

                                                This ended Pakistan’s 32-year wait for success at the Games 

                                                Throw: 92.97-m throw

                                                Winning date: 8 Aug 2024

                                                Arshad belongs to Mian Channu.

                                                 Nadeem’s throw was Pakistan’s first individual gold medal

                                                Note: It also shattered the previous Olympic record of 90.57m, set by the Netherlands’ Andreas Thorkildsen at the Beijing 2008 Olympics.

                                                The throw now stands as the sixth longest throw ever, and the best in the world this year.

                                                 ****

                                                499

                                                Which dam in Pakistan built with the help of world bank?

                                                Correct Answer: Tarbela Dam
                                                Show explanation
                                                Explanation
                                                • The Tarbela Dam in Pakistan was built with the assistance of the World Bank.
                                                  • Tarbela Dam is one of the largest earth-filled dams in the world.
                                                  • Tarbela Dam is an earth-filled dam along the Indus River in KPK.
                                                  • Installed capacity: 4,888 MW
                                                  • Height: 143 m
                                                  • Completed: 1976
                                                  500

                                                  Khilafat movement was a political campaign launched by _____?

                                                  Correct Answer: Muslims
                                                  Show explanation
                                                  Explanation

                                                  The Khilafat movement (1919–22) was a political campaign launched by Indian Muslims.

                                                  The 'Khilafat Movement Day' was observed on 17th October 1919. 

                                                  This campaign was launched in Defence of the Caliphate, led in India by the two Brothers Muḥammad and Shaukat Ali and by Abul Kalam Azad.
                                                  Nice work getting this far. Consistency beats intensity — come back tomorrow and keep stacking sets.
